# GitHub Copilot Custom Agents

These agent profiles are intended for GitHub Copilot coding agent.

They mirror the repository's governed handoff model:

1. `pm.agent.md`
2. `issue-planner.agent.md`
3. `coding.agent.md`
4. `review.agent.md`

Use them as separate roles. Do not ask one Copilot agent to perform all four stages in one pass.
